subcodes.first_line: O true spiritual and celestial scion of Jamal Effendi, even as Jonah became the companion of the whale in its depths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله حقیقی روحانی ملکوتی جمال افندی حضرت یونس چون مونس حوت شد در درون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @stories; anecdotes, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
